name: What happens first after I tell my boss about my work injury in Boise?
description: Employer notifies insurer; you get medical care.[1]

mainEntity.name: What happens first after I tell my boss about my work injury in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: Employer notifies insurer; you get medical care.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Employer reports to insurer within 7 days, who files Form 122 with Utah/Idaho divisions; you get copies and rights form.[1] Doctor files Form 123.[1] Key factors: Seek treatment immediately; explain injury details.[1][2] Don't delay—protections like no retaliation kick in.[2] This starts medical and wage benefits flow.[1]
